title: PriceBridge: Supplier vs Sahibinden Market Comparison

methodology.price_comparison: Supplier USD converted to TRY at live USD/TRY rate. Sahibinden prices are median (not mean) to filter outliers.
methodology.median_explanation: Median picks the middle value, ignoring extreme outliers. For even counts, averages the two middle values.
methodology.currency: All TRY values shown. EUR equivalents provided for reference.
